title: AN ACT CREATING A BARANGAY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF NORZAGARAY, PROVINCE OF BULACAN TO BE KNOWN AS BARANGAY FRIENDSHIP VILLAGE RESOURCES OR BARANGAY FVR

chunks.text:
Manila Bulletin, September 13, 2025 p.13

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 12279, September 07, 2025 ]

AN ACT CREATING A BARANGAY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF NORZAGARAY, PROVINCE OF BULACAN TO BE KNOWN AS BARANGAY FRIENDSHIP VILLAGE RESOURCES OR BARANGAY FVR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Creation of Barangay Friendship Village Resources.

- There is hereby created a barangay in the Municipality of Norzagaray, Province of Bulacan, to be known as Barangay Friendship Village Resources or "Barangay FVR".

SEC. 2.

Territorial Boundaries.

- The territorial boundaries of Barangay FVR are hereby described as follows:

Description of Corners: All points referred to on plan and are marked on the ground as follows: pts. 1 to 20 by Old Pls. Cyl. Conc. Mons. 15 by 80 cm., pts. 20 to 36 by Stake, pts. 36 to 47 by Old Pls. Cyl. Conc. Mons. 15 by 80 cm.

SEC. 3.

Conduct and Supervision of Plebiscite.

- The plebiscite conducted and supervised by the Commission on Elections pursuant to

Sangguniang Panlalawigan

Ordinance No. 003, which was duly ratified and proclaimed by the Plebiscite Board of Canvassers on October 12, 2002 shall serve as substantial compliance with the plebiscite requirement under Section 10 of Republic Act No. 7160, as amended, otherwise known as the Local Government Code of 1991.

SEC. 4.

Incumbent Barangay Officials.

- The incumbent elected barangay officials of Barangay FVR shall continue to hold office until such time that their successors have been duly elected and qualified.

SEC. 5.

Public Infrastructure and Facilities.

- All public infrastructure and facilities existing in Barangay FVR at the time of the approval of this Act are hereby transferred without cost or compensation to and shall be administered by the new barangay.

SEC. 6.

National Tax Allotment Shares.

- Barangay FVR shall be entitled to National Tax Allotment shares pursuant to Section 285 of the Local Government Code of 1991, as amended.

SEC. 7.

Repealing Clause.

- All laws, decrees, executive orders, rules and regulations which are inconsistent with this Act are hereby repealed or modified accordingly.

SEC. 8.

Effectivity.

- This Act shall take effect after fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in a national newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.)

FRANCIS "CHIZ" G. ESCUDERO

(SGD.)

FERDINAND MARTIN G. ROMUALDEZ

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act, which is originated in the House of Representatives, was passed by the House of Representatives on November 15, 2022, amended by the Senate of the Philippines on June 9, 2025, and which amendments were concurred in by the House of Representatives on June 11, 2025

(SGD.)

RENATO N. BANTUG, JR.

(SGD.)

REGINALD S. VELASCO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: Lapsed into law on SEP 07 2025 without the signature of the President, in accordance with Article VI, Section 27(1) of the Constitution.

FERDINAND ROMUALDEZ MARCOS JR.

President of the Philippines
